name: la-bestia
description: Deterministic, tested, MCP-ready Claude Code harness. 15 archetype-grounded agents (12 core + 3 language specialists). 15 commands incl. /flow + /flow-worktree + /issue + /pr-create + /plan-flow. 9 hooks (block-secrets, inject-context, restore-context, route-prompt, log-agents, log-session, cwd-changed, notify, architecture-gate). 7 skills incl. lessons-loop + worktree-flow + frontend-design. 9 bin utilities incl. worktree-add/remove/list. 5-layer memory with append-only lessons. Confidence tagging anti-hallucination layer. Single-LLM, single-operator, project-agnostic, zero external vault dependencies.
